{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322055207A361C086B57AAF57DA1A"}"},"total":1614},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7365190676751663934","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不同于寻常无脑爽的海贼小说 ，可以说是人情世故版的文戏多一些，但比95%以上的同人写的好看很多，唯一可能觉得难受就是男主那几个情人，总体挺好的，可以打到9.3或9.4分","text_exts":[{"e":23,"s":19,"text":"人情世故","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%BA%E6%83%85%E4%B8%96%E6%95%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774129927AF57DA1A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227365190676751663934%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227306829394985618494%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%BA%E6%83%85%E4%B8%96%E6%95%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714844727,"group_id":"7306829394985618494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxiBE98Sdh/sKgAAPwlvjqeu1HMGN2CuYdeTIIEUNoeW","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f08a5a5f877847d09512eac563623a73~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704206&x-signature=fFixssZhco9BAskfX%2BDOvkgwGhU%3D","user_id":"4420451354022867","user_name":"水岸听风."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4420451354022867","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7306829394985618494","book_info":{"abstract":"加入海军第一年。
“忠诚，正义，勇敢！”
加入海军第五年。
“你不拿，我不拿，战国大将怎么拿？战国大将不拿，我们还怎么进步啊？”
加入海军第十年。
“战国元帅，你咋就不敢玛丽乔亚上的五老星们真刀真枪的干一架呢？”
那一年，奥尔托伦加入海军，还是个新人，满脑子都是如何走上高层，看看这世界的风景。
后几年，奥尔托伦成了G-5的基地长，他手握七八万海军一线精锐，只能忠诚！
再然后，奥尔托伦成为了海军本部大将，负责总督新世界，他手握几十万海军，靠的就是一句‘五老星夸我忠义勇猛，战国元帅待我如亲子’！
最后，奥尔托伦手握天下兵马，麾下何止百万，一声令下，大海都要抖三抖。
那一天，他走在海军本部，突然冒出来了几个海军将领，将身为大海最强的他，一把就制伏了，并且还把一件黄袍披在了他的身上，告诉他，天冷了，大将您要多添件衣服。
看着那一众用殷切目光注视着自己的海军将领们。
奥尔托伦只能无奈的长叹一句道：“我忠诚了这么多年，名声一朝散尽，你们这可是害苦了朕啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/641b8f3e2a77c1afb57f511a1e8bf4b0","author":"橘子与大海","author_id":"","book_id":"7306829394985618494","book_name":"海军：忠诚大大滴有！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#3070b8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":833,"name":"海贼王","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=833&name=海贼王&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7306830947666641470","read_count":"44364","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1297442"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"455","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,海贼,同人,海贼王,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/41c0e54a4597930d9fa9aa6e2dda5118~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779313927&x-signature=5yk7vaZSh3q%2BsUn56h01Ra6p5G4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1348441174705428","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"499"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322055207A361C086B57AAF57DA1A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读20小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":73330,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4423},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7371055378829935385","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"偏向权谋向的一本海军文，文笔不错，不过剧情和布局才是顶尖，和老马现在连载的那本，我愿称之为番茄两大海军巨头，只不过那本更偏向力量，这本侧重布局和谋划，主角实力也很强，不过不会轻易下场，别有一份风味，很喜欢，学到了不少东西。
如果是不喜欢看无脑爽文的，值得一看，虽然有点慢热，但质量绝对在线[赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716209832,"group_id":"7306829394985618494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不能改id，南蚌。573081407","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N761LF3Rr+SGmsFjKagGMRiNaGV2l/z2twCLzfi9lLNh","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8e4fc3c5e72b422584d6138bab0d8d50~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707075&x-signature=9u9h1Uj%2Fv%2B0SXoTo27h3%2FXCyOps%3D","user_id":"2450131834116141","user_name":"远依不会写书"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2450131834116141","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1762039983,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7306829394985618494","book_info":{"abstract":"加入海军第一年。

nt":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":48058,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":9640},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7512643419450688318","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得很好故事情节什么的都还行，因为我本身也是个半云海贼，动漫看到推进城的时候就没再看了，后续打的各种补丁和补充的细节也不太清楚。但是丝毫不影响阅读，人物塑造也都挺有意思，唯独就是缇娜塑造的不是很好，因为我记得缇娜的人虽然是偏高冷的但是她说话很可爱，什么缇娜也不知道呢，反正说话都会加自己的名字，这个算是一个小缺点吧但是不影响，还有一个小缺点就是玩老朱家的梗，玩的有点多，一次两次还可以，但是玩多了就有点厌烦，不过瑕不掩瑜写得很好推荐阅读"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749180560,"group_id":"7306829394985618494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8F6aQc9SkNGXM0AwrBGidU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ce27922c34e34afd9a42a91c91b6b299~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705266&x-signature=8%2BnTHUTuH8n%2FeZUg0FWoGq6F7Ps%3D","user_id":"926207991093056","user_name":"_絢"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"926207991093056","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1756941283,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intr
